name: COP EER Calculator
seo_description: Use our free cop and eer calculator to quickly estimate cop, eer based on potencia_util_kw, potencia_elec_kw. No registration needed.
example_label: Calculate COP from 3.5 kW heat, 1 kW input.

range_hints.potencia_util_kw: Thermal output delivered. Residential split: 2-5 kW, Commercial: 10-50 kW
range_hints.potencia_elec_kw: Measured power draw. Efficient units consume 3-5 times less than thermal output delivered

result_context: COP: {cop}. EER: {eer}. Clase energética: {clase_eficiencia}. Ahorro of the {ahorro_vs_resistencia_pct}% frente a resistance electrical.
formula_display: COP = Q_útil(kW) ÷ P_eléctrica(kW) | EER = Q_frío(BTU/h) ÷ P_eléctrica(W)
mistakes: Confusing COP with EER — The COP es to modo heat and The EER to modo frío
Use data of catálogo without Verify condiciones of ensayo — The efficiency real puede ser inferior
Ignorar The COP seasonal (SCOP) — The nominal es a carga máxima, The SCOP refleja The efficiency anual
